author: writer-1
rationale: Input pin only (P2 P-9): resolves the 'PINNED-AT-INPUTS:claude-haiku-4.5-exact-api-model-id-pinned-at-staging-temperature-0-designer-family-caveat-disclosed-FORK-2' placeholder under the maintainer ruling of 2026-07-10 that Claude judges are reached via Claude Code sub-agents/sub-processes with NO Anthropic API key on this box. ADJUDICATION (design owner): the headless claude -p sub-process form LAWFULLY fills the frozen judge-p3 operationalization — it preserves every frozen property to the maximum the interface exposes: exact model id pinned AND runtime-verified (MEASURED 2026-07-10 on claude-code 2.1.201, three staging probes: modelUsage key and init-event model both 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'); no tools structurally ('--tools ""' yields init tools:[] — tool use impossible at the harness level, plus per-call tripwires); single-word output (pinned format-only system prompt; result field 'yes'/'no' observed; pinned normalization); stateless per-item independence by construction (one fresh OS process, fresh session, empty cwd, no persistence, no cross-item context); blinding structural + mechanically audited (empty out-of-repo cwd, no project CLAUDE.md, user-global CLAUDE.md verified absent, --setting-sources "" loads no settings, --system-prompt replaces the default, fresh empty memory path; grep audit per spec section 7.3). 'Temperature 0' is discharged as maximum-determinism-the-interface-exposes (ASM-0241): claude-code exposes NO temperature parameter (MEASURED from --help), the SAME situation as codex-cli for judges p1/p2, which the frozen record itself already operationalizes this way via the judge-1p invocation form it cites; MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=0 additionally removes thinking (MEASURED: single text block, 4 output tokens) as the analog of codex effort low; FIRST VALID ANSWER IS FINAL; the frozen retest gate bounds realized stability. The ALTERNATIVE in-session Agent-tool sub-agent form was adjudicated NON-conforming and is FORBIDDEN for this record (ASM-0240): it injects the project CLAUDE.md and auto-memory context (which name the project and NSM) into the judge — a hard violation of the frozen 'judges see only the question bytes' clause — and pins only a model alias. Practicality: 808 sequential calls measured at 0.9-4.4 s and 0.0002-0.003 USD nominal each (~under 1 h, ~0.2-2 USD, inside the frozen section-3.7 estimate and the 40 USD cap); no agent-concurrency interaction (plain sequential sub-processes driven by the runner). One-shot pin discipline applies. RE-ISSUE + VALUE RECIPE (correction seq 3): this amendment was re-issued 2026-07-10 with only the patch value, the date, and this appended paragraph changed — the verdict-spine overlay guard (tools/registry/verdict-gen.py PIN_VALUE_RE) lawfully requires every post-freeze ops pin value to be a bare 40- or 64-char lowercase hex digest, and the prose-valued original of this amendment (file sha256 7c39c893b3e4111fe08977756ba6807573a90eb1a8c8e24822988369c8d99f53, preserved in git history at the pre-reissue commit) never survived any overlay, so nothing ever consumed it. The value is now, per the f2 amendment-6 / truthstyle amendment-1 staged-manifest convention extended to model_revisions (ASM-0440): sha256 over the canonical JSON (sort_keys, compact separators, UTF-8) of the {judge-key: model-revision-prose} dict committed verbatim as poc/truthstyle-2x2/model-revisions-manifest.json (canonical bytes + one trailing newline; that file's own sha256 = 80bcd310362b871f4ae39e0c0faea851f1a2d0fa7fe03a0f5ee433a5b8373fe9). The manifest's judge-p3-haiku45 value is BYTE-IDENTICAL to this amendment's superseded prose value (including every byte-exact command spelling), so the pin CONTENT is unchanged — merely relocated to a committed file and committed to by digest. Amendments seq 2 and seq 3 intentionally carry the IDENTICAL digest: both commit to the same manifest (precedent: f2 amendment seq 1 fills two corpus pins with one digest). One-shot pin discipline extends to the manifest bytes: any change before the final-phase run invalidates this value and requires a pre-run correction record, not a new ops amendment.
